Forget 'parking the bus'... THIS was the original masterclass in defensive art!

Helenio Herrera's Inter in the 60s. Catenaccio wasn't just defence; it was a deadly counter-attacking weapon. Imagine, a libero dictating play, springing attacks from deep. Revolutionary stuff that won back-to-back European Cups. Modern tactics owe them EVERYTHING.
Barcelona dominated the LaLiga season, clinching the title with an impressive 94 points and scoring a league-high 95 goals!

Mourinho's Porto run was a SCAM... against physics!

2004 UCL winners Porto only spent ~€20M on transfers the season before their triumph. Compare that to the giants they conquered. Pure tactical genius, or the greatest upset ever? The numbers don't lie. #UCL #Mourinho #FootballHistory
